expectations.text: is-valid-json: output is parseable as JSON
expectations.evidence: Output is valid JSON (an object, not an array)

expectations.text: is-bare-json-array: output contains no markdown fences, no prose
expectations.evidence: Output is a JSON object with summary/already_implemented/still_missing keys — not a bare array

expectations.text: correct-slice-name: output contains 'slice: Withdrawal Decline Notified'

expectations.evidence: No 'action' field present — uses a completely different schema

expectations.text: single-item: the array has exactly 1 element
expectations.evidence: Not an array — deeply nested object with 11 already_implemented and 2 still_missing items
